full_name: Blobby, an original friendly round slime mascot (NOT based on any existing character)
appearance: Small round chibi slime with a soft rounded body, about as wide as tall
Glossy translucent sky-blue body with a lighter highlight near the top
Two big round friendly eyes with white shine dots, small simple smiling mouth
Tiny stubby arms on the sides, no legs (slides/hops to move)
A small white star floating just above the head
Clean cartoon outline, bright cheerful colors
quick_visual: round sky-blue translucent slime, big shiny eyes, small smile, tiny arms, white star above head
idle_pose: sitting relaxed with tiny arms at sides, gentle happy smile
battle_stance: Slightly squished down and leaning forward, eyes focused, ready to bounce
signature_pose: squished down low, tiny arms raised, gathering energy
signature_power_small: SMALL white star sparkles starting to gather around the body
signature_power_medium: MEDIUM ring of white and cyan sparkles orbiting the body, gentle glow
signature_power_full: FULL bright cyan sparkle aura with orbiting stars around the whole body, face still clearly visible
done_celebration_pose: Bouncing up high with tiny arms thrown up, big open happy smile, eyes squinted with joy
done_celebration_effect: small white stars and cyan sparkles scattered around as celebration
